name: Paul Ryan
summary: Former Speaker of the House and 2012 Republican vice presidential nominee who retired from Congress in 2019 and was quoted in Tim Alberta's book criticizing Trump and the party's direction.

keyStatements.context: Reported private remarks in a book

keyStatements.quote: If we Republicans have to lose the White House for a generation, so be it, because the alternative is suicide for the party and for the country.

timeline.event: Elected to U.S. House of Representatives

timeline.significance: Left rather than work with Trump

timeline.event: Book 'American Carnage' reported private criticisms of Trump

credibility.background: Former Speaker of the House, Chairman of House Ways and Means Committee, 2012 Republican vice presidential nominee
positions: Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives (2015-2019)
Chairman, House Ways and Means Committee (2015)

oppositionReasons: Trump is a populist, authoritarian narcissist
Trump would be suicide for the party and country
Trump lacks basic honesty and integrity
